```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
#wcg-ws-open(
  day: "Day 7", num: 7, title: "My personal awareness plan",
  purpose: "To combine the week into one simple, repeatable plan that is yours.",
  how: [Look back at your notes from the week. Pull the most useful pieces into
  one page you can return to.],
)

#wcg-field("One pattern I want to keep noticing", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("One moment where I will pause", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("My one small \"when-then\" shift", lines: 2)
#wcg-field("One change I made to my surroundings", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("What I will do on a hard day", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("One reason this matters to me", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("Reflection — which one habit is most worth keeping?", lines: 1)

```

> **A gentle reminder.**
>
> This is your plan, not a test. Adjust it freely as life changes.

```{=typst}
#wcg-ws-footer()
```
